events.outcome: One live offer set plus one separate fallback card become visible.
events.monotoneEffect: Starts open-choice provenance under one offerSetHash.

events.outcome: One ranked offer row becomes the selected anchor for commit.
events.monotoneEffect: Pins selection to the current truthTupleHash.

events.outcome: Callback or return fallback becomes the live branch without consuming rank ordinal.
events.monotoneEffect: Preserves the prior ranked set as read-only provenance.

events.outcome: Commit begins under current reservation fence and provider binding.
events.monotoneEffect: Prevents stale tuple commit from taking side effects.

events.outcome: Weak or partial proof widens pending posture only.
events.monotoneEffect: Does not mint calm booked truth.

events.outcome: Durable appointment truth exists and the hub case becomes booked_pending_practice_ack.
events.monotoneEffect: Patient confirmation may calm; practice acknowledgement debt remains open.
Starts transport, delivery, and acknowledgement evidence lanes separately.
May widen pending guidance but does not clear acknowledgement debt.

events.outcome: Delivery evidence or non-delivery risk becomes durable.

events.monotoneEffect: Allows practiceVisibilityState to advance to acknowledged only on the live tuple.

events.outcome: Older acknowledgement becomes auditable only after a new generation or new tuple.
events.monotoneEffect: Prevents stale generations from clearing fresh debt.

events.outcome: Manage posture becomes stale, blocked, or expired.
events.monotoneEffect: Removes stale CTAs instead of leaving optimistic buttons live.

events.outcome: One current projection resolves offer, confirmation, practice, and closure facets.
